D:\VisualStudio\Common7\IDE\CommonExtensions\Microsoft\CMake\CMake\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\log_test.dir/objects.a
D:\GCC\mingw64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\log_test.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\log_test.dir\objects1.rsp
D:\GCC\mingw64\bin\g++.exe -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\log_test.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o log_test.exe -Wl,--out-implib,liblog_test.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\log_test.dir\linkLibs.rsp
